full_text:
Fu Jin µēČń”ü
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Jin (µēČń”ü). Besieged Huo Jun at Jiameng for a year but was defeated in surprise attack. Fu Jin was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
